SEARCH
Package bcu.cmp5332.bookingsystem.test

Class FlightTest

java.lang.Object
bcu.cmp5332.bookingsystem.test.FlightTest
@DisplayName("Flight Class Tests") public class FlightTest extends Object
Comprehensive unit tests for the Flight class using JUnit 5. Tests all constructors, getters, setters, and business logic.
